rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. Fam. Code §261.201 governs confidentiality of child abuse/neglect investigation records. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects and share no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 261.201. CONFIDENTIALITY AND DISCLOSURE OF INFORMATION.
_note: No conflict; proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change is unrelated to Fam. Code §261.201.
